About Me

I'm a Full Stack Engineer based in Taiwan, passionate about building products that make a real impact. I specialize in python, and I love exploring the intersection of AI and web development.

I'm always open to interesting opportunities — whether it's building something new together, contributing to your team, or just having a great tech conversation.

Projects

Things I've built and shipped

Featured

AI Chat Platform

A real-time AI-powered chat platform built with Next.js and OpenAI API, featuring streaming responses, conversation history, and multi-model support.

Next.js TypeScript OpenAI PostgreSQL Tailwind
GitHub
Featured

DevOps Dashboard

A unified DevOps monitoring dashboard that aggregates metrics from GitHub Actions, AWS CloudWatch, and Datadog into a single pane of glass.

React Node.js AWS Docker GraphQL
GitHub

CLI Scaffold Tool

An open-source CLI tool for scaffolding TypeScript projects with opinionated defaults — ESLint, Prettier, Vitest, and GitHub Actions pre-configured.

TypeScript Node.js Commander.js
GitHub

E-commerce API

A high-performance RESTful API for e-commerce backends with inventory management, payment integration, and role-based access control.

Go PostgreSQL Redis Docker
GitHub

Personal Finance Tracker

A mobile-first web app for tracking personal finances with automatic categorization, trend analysis, and monthly budget alerts.

React FastAPI Python SQLite
GitHub

Open Source Contributions

Active contributor to several open source projects including documentation improvements, bug fixes, and new feature implementations.

Open Source Various

My professional journey

Full Stack Engineer

Your Company
2023 – Present
  • ▹ Built and maintained multiple web applications serving 10k+ monthly active users.

Previous Company

  • ▹ Developed RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints consumed by mobile and web clients.
